---
title: "Contact Us"
description: "Get in touch with chen.ist. Book a consultation, send us an email, or visit our offices in Craiova and Bucharest, Romania."
from: markdown+raw_html
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        /* Ensure raw HTML is properly rendered */
        form {
          display: block;
          width: 100%;
        }
        input, textarea, .form-control {
          display: block;
          width: 100%;
          padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem;
          font-size: 1rem;
          font-weight: 400;
          line-height: 1.5;
          color: var(--bs-body-color);
          background-color: var(--bs-form-control-bg);
          background-clip: padding-box;
          border: var(--bs-border-width) solid var(--bs-border-color);
          appearance: none;
          border-radius: 0.375rem;
          transition: border-color 0.15s ease-in-out, box-shadow 0.15s ease-in-out;
        }
        .form-label {
          margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }
        </style>
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="/">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Contact</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
```

## Get in Touch

We'd love to hear from you! Whether you have a question about our services, need a quote, or want to discuss a potential project, our team is ready to assist you.

### Contact Information

::: {.row .mt-4}
::: {.col-md-6}
::: {.card .mb-4}
::: {.card-body}
### <i class="bi bi-envelope text-green me-2"></i> Email

For general inquiries: [office@chen.ist](mailto:office@chen.ist)

For support: [support@chen.ist](mailto:support@chen.ist)
:::
:::
:::

::: {.col-md-6}
::: {.card .mb-4}
::: {.card-body}
### <i class="bi bi-calendar-check text-green me-2"></i> Book a Meeting

Schedule a consultation directly:

[Book a Call](https://cal.com/chenist){.btn .btn-success target="_blank"}
:::
:::
:::
:::

### Office Locations

::: {.row .mt-4}
::: {.col-md-6}
::: {.card .mb-4}
::: {.card-body}
### <i class="bi bi-geo-alt text-green me-2"></i> Headquarters

Str. Filantropiei, 1-3, 200143
Craiova, Romania
:::
:::
:::

::: {.col-md-6}
::: {.card .mb-4}
::: {.card-body}
### <i class="bi bi-geo-alt text-green me-2"></i> Partners Office

Bucharest, Romania

For support: [bucharest@chen.ist](mailto:bucharest@chen.ist)


:::
:::
:::
:::

## Book a Meeting

Schedule a consultation directly using the calendar below.

```{=html}
<div class="mt-4 mb-5" style="width:100%;min-height:600px;" id="cal-inline-embed"></div>
<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    if (typeof Cal !== 'undefined') {
      Cal("inline", {elementOrSelector: "#cal-inline-embed", calLink: "chenist", layout: "month_view"});
    }
  });
</script>
```

## Connect With Us

::: {.row .mt-5}
::: {.col-md-12 .text-center}
[<i class="bi bi-linkedin me-1"></i> LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/chenist){.btn .btn-outline-primary .me-2 .mb-2}
[<i class="bi bi-github me-1"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/chenist){.btn .btn-outline-primary .me-2 .mb-2}
[<i class="bi bi-twitter me-1"></i> Twitter](https://twitter.com/chenist){.btn .btn-outline-primary .me-2 .mb-2}
:::
:::
